title: FDIC Institution
description: A financial institution record from the FDIC BankFind Suite API.

CERT.description: FDIC certificate number uniquely identifying each institution.

NAME.description: The legal name of the financial institution.

CITY.description: City in which the institution's headquarters is located.

STNAME.description: Full name of the state in which the institution is headquartered.

STALP.description: Two-letter abbreviation of the state in which the institution is headquartered.

ZIP.description: ZIP code of the institution's headquarters.

COUNTY.description: County where the institution is headquartered.

ACTIVE.description: Whether the institution is active (1) or not (0).

ASSET.description: Total assets held by the institution (in thousands of dollars).

DEP.description: Total deposits held by the institution (in thousands of dollars).

NETINC.description: Net income of the institution (in thousands of dollars).

OFFICES.description: Number of offices/branches operated by the institution.

CBSA.description: Core Based Statistical Area name where the institution is located.

DATEUPDT.description: Date the record was last updated.
